task: Find the HGX H100 driver for Ubuntu 22.04 on AMD64 CPU.
graderReasoning: The agent reached the official NVIDIA driver details page at https://www.nvidia.com/en-us/drivers/details/249905/ titled “Data Center Driver for Ubuntu 22.04 570.172.08 | Linux 64-bit Ubuntu 22.04 | NVIDIA.” The page snapshot explicitly showed Driver Version 570.172.08, Operating System Linux 64-bit Ubuntu 22.04, and a Download link. The agent then extracted the actual download URL ending in `_amd64.deb`, which satisfies the AMD64 CPU requirement. It also extracted body text showing supported products including “HGX H100,” confirming this driver applies to HGX H100. Therefore the requested HGX H100 driver for Ubuntu 22.04 on AMD64 was successfully found and provided.
final_result_response:
I found it on NVIDIA:

**HGX H100 driver for Ubuntu 22.04 AMD64**
- **Driver:** Data Center Driver for Ubuntu 22.04
- **Version:** 570.172.08
- **Release date:** Jul 17, 2025
- **Platform:** Linux 64-bit Ubuntu 22.04
- **Package:** AMD64 `.deb`
- **CUDA Toolkit:** 12.8
- **Supports:** HGX H100

NVIDIA page: https://www.nvidia.com/en-us/drivers/details/249905/ <citation refs="search_a29e0a5a900345fe90b64d6caa0b92a6#1">Official NVIDIA result: “Data Center Driver for Ubuntu 22.04 570.172.08 | Linux 64-bit...”</citation>

Direct download: https://us.download.nvidia.com/tesla/570.172.08/nvidia-driver-local-repo-ubuntu2204-570.172.08_1.0-1_amd64.deb
action_history: Opening NVIDIA website: const p1 = await openTab('https://www.nvidia.com/');
Opening NVIDIA drivers page: await page.locator('e121').click();
Opening NVIDIA drivers page: await page.locator('e14').click();
Opening HGX Software link: await page.locator('e29').click();
Selecting Supported Products tab with keyboard: await page.locator('e30').press('Enter');
